name: Gingerbread House Pillow - Bullseye's Playground™
description: Add a touch of whimsy to your home with the Gingerbread House Pillow from Bullseye's Playground. This novelty plush pillow, crafted entirely from polyester, features a charming shape that adds a playful element to any room. Its soft, plush construction ensures comfort, while the sewn seam closure keeps it intact. Perfect for indoor use, this brown pillow is a delightful addition to your decor, offering both style and coziness.
